title: EatBabys
description: Texture Pack that changes apples, golden apples and enchanted golden apples in to babys.
body:
Ever looked at an apple in Minecraft and thought, "This is missing something…”? Well, i fixed that. In this cursed and chaotic texture pack, all apples and their variants (golden, enchanted) are retextured as babies.

- Regular Apple – Just a baby. Probably someone's.
- Golden Apple – That one baby raised by royalty.
- Enchanted Golden Apple – Glowing, powerful... possibly ancient. Do not question the lore.

Sounds weird? It is. But i dare you to eat a baby and heal up like nothing happened. Perfect for your twisted amusement.
